claims.summary: Verify Astrid phase transitions are persisted as first-class typed cards rather than only mode side effects.
Verify replay metadata includes bounded before/after snapshots, duration, confidence, trigger, anchor, and subjective friction.
Verify behavioral and relational cards remain replyable language artifacts and do not automatically trigger MomentCapture or peer control.
Any Minime sensory ingestion, automatic phase reaction, or shared-stance-to-control mapping remains Tier 5 pending protocol and operator approval.
